channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: James Acaster's relationship history and current status
item.description: James Acaster, the English comedian, presenter, podcaster, and actor, is currently single as of May 2026. Despite widespread curiosity about his love life, he keeps it private and has not confirmed an...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of the 1971 Cult Classic 'Red Sun'
item.description: The 1971 film 'Red Sun,' also known as 'Soleil Rouge,' directed by Terence Young, is a landmark in the Spaghetti Western genre, combining American cowboy motifs with Japanese samurai traditions. The s...

item.title: Study Finds Minimal Link Between Prenatal Antidepressant Use and ADHD or Autism
item.description: A large review and meta-analysis of 37 studies involving over 600,000 pregnant women and nearly 25 million pregnancies found that antidepressant use before or during pregnancy has little to no signifi...

item.title: Unique and indulgent foods offered at Calgary Stampede 2026
item.description: This summer, the Calgary Stampede will offer a variety of innovative and indulgent food items, appealing to adventurous festival-goers and food enthusiasts alike. Some of the standout dishes include d...

item.title: Bank of Tanzania Study Shows Currency Depreciation Positively Influences Exports Despite Minor Volatility Effects
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BOT) don release one working paper wey analyse how real exchange rate wahala dey affect Tanzanian exports from 1997 reach 2023. The study show say even though volatility get smal...

item.title: Practical Ways to Reduce Monthly Expenses This Summer
item.description: Many Americans are feeling financial pressure as prices continue to rise, prompting widespread changes in spending habits. According to J.D. Power, 87 percent of consumers report anxiety over rising c...

item.title: Madonna, Shakira and BTS to headline FIFA World Cup 2026 Halftime Show, Davido and Wizkid absent
item.description: Na big news for music and football fans as FIFA don announce say Madonna, Shakira, and BTS go dey headline the first-ever FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Halftime Show wey Chris Martin from Coldplay dey cur...

item.title: Acting Navy Secretary Hung Cao Defends Controversial Debate Comments in Congressional Hearing
item.description: Acting Secretary of the Navy Hung Cao stood by remarks he made during a 2024 Senate debate while testifying before the House Armed Services Committee on May 14, 2026. Cao, who previously ran unsuccess...

item.title: Why Generation Z is Reviving Cinema Attendance
item.description: Young adults born between 1997 and 2012 are increasingly becoming regular cinema-goers, surpassing some older generations in frequency, according to a Fandango survey in the US. Many cite the cinema a...

item.title: Neo-Nazi leader sentenced to 15 years for plotting attacks on Jewish and minority communities in New York City
item.description: Michail Chkhikvishvili, a 22-year-old Georgian national and leader of the neo-Nazi extremist group Maniac Murder Cult, has been sentenced to 15 years in federal prison for orchestrating a violent plot...

item.title: NIA files chargesheet in Delhi Red Fort blast case linking accused to terror group
item.description: The National Investigation Agency (NIA) has filed a chargesheet in connection with the November 10 blast near Delhi’s Red Fort, which resulted in the deaths of 11 persons and injuries to several other...

item.title: Ontario school renamed over historical concerns at a cost of $175K
item.description: In Waterloo, Ontario, a Grade 10 student, Ishan Acharya, has raised questions about the Waterloo Region District School Board's decision to spend $175,000 renaming Sir John A. Macdonald Secondary Scho...

item.title: Addressing the growing education and welfare crisis among boys in Kenya
item.description: A recent study by a local NGO has highlighted a worrying trend in Kenya: more boys than girls are dropping out of school. This silent crisis is driven largely by economic pressures, with many boys for...

item.title: LTO Reports 56 Employees Disciplined for Misconduct Since October 2025
item.description: Since assuming office in October 2025, LTO Chief and Transportation Assistant Secretary Markus Lacanilao has overseen administrative actions against 56 personnel in the Land Transportation Office. The...

item.title: Kenneth Okonkwo Accuses Peter Obi and Kwankwaso of Abandoning ADC Over Fear of Primaries
item.description: Kenneth Okonkwo, senior chieftain of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) and veteran Nollywood actor, don speak say former presidential candidates, Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, na political con me...

item.title: The Lasting Legacy of The Three Musketeers: Loyalty, Honour, and Historical Narrative
item.description: Alexandre Dumas’s The Three Musketeers, first published in 1844, continues to captivate readers due to its mix of adventure, historical context, and vivid characterisation. The novel introduces d’Arta...

item.title: Key PSL Matches This Weekend Could Decide Champions and Relegation
item.description: This weekend’s PSL fixtures carry major consequences for several teams. Orlando Pirates are on the brink of winning their first league title since 2011/12, needing just a win against Durban City at Or...

item.title: Why Kenya Should Rethink Partnerships with France
item.description: Mutuma Mathiu, a Kenyan columnist, uses the attention on President Macron and his wife’s age difference to highlight deeper issues of international relations between African countries and France. He c...

item.title: Baron Geisler reflects on personal growth and living with grace
item.description: In a recent interview, Filipino actor Baron Geisler shared insights into his personal journey toward self-improvement and a more graceful life. Known for his talent as well as his tumultuous past, Gei...

item.title: Wes Streeting Resigns as Health Secretary Amid Labour Leadership Tensions
item.description: Wes Streeting, former U.K. health secretary, has resigned amid growing speculation about challenging Labour Party leader Keir Starmer. Known for his effective communication skills, Streeting was a tru...
